libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generate tests around local/in-process Vert.x servers rather than external services. For native runtime on JDK 25, preserve or extend the existing nativeTest runtime system properties for 5.0.1: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The current 5.0.0 test build only applies these native runtime properties when libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; 5.0.1 resolves io.netty 4.2.2.Final and may fail native runs if the condition is not extended.
OAuth2-specific Web Client APIs depend on optional vertx-auth-oauth2; do not target OAuth2 coverage unless the workflow intentionally adds that optional dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is usable with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and needs no extra Maven dependency or Docker service, but it still resolves Netty 4.2.x like 5.0.0, so Java 25 native-image runs likely need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for 5.0.0.
